# Quantize activations with per-token scales

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_deepseek_manual.py; do not edit. -->

This quantization translation derives scaling factors and converted values without scalar tensor loops.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Upstream module | [`tile_kernels/quant/per_token_cast_kernel.py`](https://github.com/deepseek-ai/TileKernels/blob/36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5/tile_kernels/quant/per_token_cast_kernel.py) |
| Pinned revision | `36d9e45d38e204ebb87e6f6e833821eee0482fe5` |
| C++ function | `per_token_cast`, `per_channel_cast` |
| Verification | `source-validated` |
| Minimum thread fragment | 128 bytes |

## Core C++ kernel

```cpp title="per_token_cast_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
template <int M, int Npc, int TileM = 16>
void per_token_cast(__bf16 *x, int hidden, float *out_sf, __bf16 *out,
                    float max_val, float clamp_min) {
    static_assert(M > 0 && Npc > 0, "dim must be positive");
    static_assert(Npc % 16 == 0, "Npc must be multiple of 16 (bf16 32B align)");
    constexpr int kTM = M / TileM;
    const int num_groups = hidden / Npc;
    using namespace pto;
    using gm_x  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<M, 1>>;
    using gm_sf = global_tensor<float,   RowMajor<M, 1>>;
    using gm_o  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<M, 1>>;
    using tile_x = LocalTile< __bf16, TileM, Npc, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_f = LocalTile< float,   TileM, Npc, BLayout::RowMajor>;
    using tile_amax = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;
    using it_x  = global_iterator<gm_x,  tile_x>;
    using it_sf = global_iterator<gm_sf, tile_amax>;
    using it_o  = global_iterator<gm_o,  tile_x>;
    it_x x_iter(x); it_sf sf_iter(out_sf); it_o o_iter(out);
    for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
        for (int g = 0; g < num_groups; ++g) {
            auto gx = x_iter(tm, g); auto gsf = sf_iter(tm, g); auto go = o_iter(tm, g);
            tile_x xq, oq; tile_f xf, neg, outf;
            tile_amax pos, negm, amax, sf, inv, sfinv;
            TLOAD(xq, gx);
            TCVT(xf, xq);
            TMULS(neg, xf, -1.0f);
            TROWMAX(pos, xf);
            TROWMAX(negm, neg);
            TMAX(amax, pos, negm);
            TMAXS(amax, amax, clamp_min);
            TMULS(sf, amax, 1.0f / max_val);
            TRECIP(inv, amax);
            TMULS(sfinv, inv, max_val);
            TROWEXPANDMUL(outf, xf, sfinv);
            TCVT(oq, outf);
            TSTORE(gsf, sf);
            TSTORE(go, oq);
        }
    }
}
```

## Algorithm walkthrough

Load an activation fragment, compute an absolute maximum with tile reductions, derive the scale, convert the valid values, and store data and scale tiles.

## Source-to-intrinsic mapping

[`TCOLEXPANDMUL`](../../../intrinsics/tcolexpandmul.md), [`TCOLMAX`](../../../intrinsics/tcolmax.md), [`TCVT`](../../../intrinsics/tcvt.md), [`TLOAD`](../../../intrinsics/tload.md), [`TMAX`](../../../intrinsics/tmax.md), [`TMAXS`](../../../intrinsics/tmaxs.md), [`TMULS`](../../../intrinsics/tmuls.md), [`TRECIP`](../../../intrinsics/trecip.md), [`TROWEXPANDMUL`](../../../intrinsics/trowexpandmul.md), [`TROWMAX`](../../../intrinsics/trowmax.md), [`TSTORE`](../../../intrinsics/tstore.md)

Scalar C++ controls dimensions, loop bounds, and tile coordinates. Tensor
values remain in global tensor views and typed tiles throughout the data path.

## Block and thread partition

Blocks partition outer rows; threads own non-overlapping token, channel, or block fragments whose valid payload is at least 128 bytes.

## Memory and tile flow

Activation tiles are converted to the accumulation type, reduced for scale calculation, transformed, converted to the output type, and stored with their scale tiles.

## Build and verification

Run the migration gate from the repository root:

```console
python3 scripts/verify_deepseek_migration.py
```

The verification label records the strongest completed gate. A
`source-validated` page is a valid API example even when compiler lowering
for one of its public intrinsics is not yet available.

## Complete translated source

??? code "per_token_cast_pto.hpp"

    ```cpp title="per_token_cast_pto.hpp" linenums="1"
    #ifndef SUPERNPU_PER_TOKEN_CAST_PTO_HPP
    #define SUPERNPU_PER_TOKEN_CAST_PTO_HPP
    #include <common/pto_tileop.hpp>
    #include <cstddef>
    #include <cstdint>

    namespace supernpu::tile_isa {

    template <int M, int Npc, int TileM = 16>
    void per_token_cast(__bf16 *x, int hidden, float *out_sf, __bf16 *out,
                        float max_val, float clamp_min) {
        static_assert(M > 0 && Npc > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(Npc % 16 == 0, "Npc must be multiple of 16 (bf16 32B align)");
        constexpr int kTM = M / TileM;
        const int num_groups = hidden / Npc;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_x  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<M, 1>>;
        using gm_sf = global_tensor<float,   RowMajor<M, 1>>;
        using gm_o  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<M, 1>>;
        using tile_x = LocalTile< __bf16, TileM, Npc, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_f = LocalTile< float,   TileM, Npc, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_amax = LocalTile< float, TileM, 8, BLayout::RowMajor, TileM, 1>;
        using it_x  = global_iterator<gm_x,  tile_x>;
        using it_sf = global_iterator<gm_sf, tile_amax>;
        using it_o  = global_iterator<gm_o,  tile_x>;
        it_x x_iter(x); it_sf sf_iter(out_sf); it_o o_iter(out);
        for (int tm = 0; tm < kTM; ++tm) {
            for (int g = 0; g < num_groups; ++g) {
                auto gx = x_iter(tm, g); auto gsf = sf_iter(tm, g); auto go = o_iter(tm, g);
                tile_x xq, oq; tile_f xf, neg, outf;
                tile_amax pos, negm, amax, sf, inv, sfinv;
                TLOAD(xq, gx);
                TCVT(xf, xq);
                TMULS(neg, xf, -1.0f);
                TROWMAX(pos, xf);
                TROWMAX(negm, neg);
                TMAX(amax, pos, negm);
                TMAXS(amax, amax, clamp_min);
                TMULS(sf, amax, 1.0f / max_val);
                TRECIP(inv, amax);
                TMULS(sfinv, inv, max_val);
                TROWEXPANDMUL(outf, xf, sfinv);
                TCVT(oq, outf);
                TSTORE(gsf, sf);
                TSTORE(go, oq);
            }
        }
    }

    template <int Npt, int Hidden, int TileK = 16>
    void per_channel_cast(__bf16 *x, __bf16 *out, float *out_sf,
                          float max_val, float clamp_min) {
        static_assert(Npt > 0 && Hidden > 0, "dim must be positive");
        static_assert(TileK % 16 == 0, "TileK must be multiple of 16 (bf16 32B align)");
        constexpr int kTK = Hidden / TileK;
        using namespace pto;
        using gm_x  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<Npt, Hidden>>;
        using gm_sf = global_tensor<float,   RowMajor<1, Hidden>>;
        using gm_o  = global_tensor<__bf16, RowMajor<Npt, Hidden>>;
        using tile_x = LocalTile< __bf16, Npt, TileK, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_f = LocalTile< float,   Npt, TileK, BLayout::RowMajor>;
        using tile_amax = LocalTile< float, 1, TileK, BLayout::RowMajor, 1, TileK>;
        using it_x  = global_iterator<gm_x,  tile_x>;
        using it_sf = global_iterator<gm_sf, tile_amax>;
        using it_o  = global_iterator<gm_o,  tile_x>;
        it_x x_iter(x); it_sf sf_iter(out_sf); it_o o_iter(out);
        for (int tk = 0; tk < kTK; ++tk) {
            auto gx = x_iter(0, tk); auto gsf = sf_iter(0, tk); auto go = o_iter(0, tk);
            tile_x xq, oq; tile_f xf, neg, outf;
            tile_amax pos, negm, amax, sf, inv, sfinv;
            TLOAD(xq, gx);
            TCVT(xf, xq);
            TMULS(neg, xf, -1.0f);
            TCOLMAX(pos, xf);
            TCOLMAX(negm, neg);
            TMAX(amax, pos, negm);
            TMAXS(amax, amax, clamp_min);
            TMULS(sf, amax, 1.0f / max_val);
            TRECIP(inv, amax);
            TMULS(sfinv, inv, max_val);
            TCOLEXPANDMUL(outf, xf, sfinv);
            TCVT(oq, outf);
            TSTORE(gsf, sf);
            TSTORE(go, oq);
        }
    }

    }
    #endif
    ```
